title: The Role of Pearson's Correlation in Experimental Design
description: A flowchart depicting how Pearson's correlation coefficient is used within the experimental design and ANOVA workflow to analyze relationships between variables.
relationships: Sequential flow from defining the question to reporting findings
Pearson's r calculation informs whether to proceed with ANOVA (e.g., to check for confounding variables or assumptions)
Results from both Pearson's r and ANOVA contribute to the final conclusions
